name: cloudflare-domain-manager-mcp
description: Manages Cloudflare Worker custom domains and D1 database lifecycle. Resolves BLT-016 gaps 1-5.

bindings.name: CF_API_TOKEN
bindings.description: Cloudflare API token — Workers:Edit, CustomDomains:Edit, DNS:Edit, D1:Edit

tools.name: add_custom_domain
tools.description: Attach hostname to Worker via Custom Domain API

tools.name: remove_custom_domain
tools.description: Detach custom domain by domain record ID

tools.name: list_custom_domains
tools.description: List all custom domains for a Worker

tools.name: list_all_worker_domains
tools.description: Full account domain map across all Workers

tools.name: check_domain_health
tools.description: HTTP health check + latency for a hostname

tools.name: list_d1_databases
tools.description: List all D1 databases with UUID

tools.name: create_d1_database
tools.description: Create new D1 database, returns UUID

doctrine: Always Custom Domain API. Never zone-level Worker routes.
